solo.description: solo agent with its configured models (qwen3-coder-next + debugger validation)

auto.description: auto orchestrator with its configured subagent models (researcher/coder/coder2/debugger)

plansolo.description: two-staged solo: native plan agent first, then solo implements in the same session (all on qwen3-coder-next; isolates the value of an explicit planning phase)

phases.prompt: Now implement the plan you just created. Work in the current working directory and produce all deliverable files exactly as the original task requires, including tests and NOTES.md.

solo-dsv4.description: solo agent on deepseek-v4-flash (debugger validator stays on qwen3-coder-next for comparability)

planbuild-dsv4.description: plan -> build chain fully on deepseek-v4-flash

phases.prompt: Now implement the plan you just created. Work in the current working directory and produce all deliverable files exactly as the original task requires, including tests and NOTES.md.

planbuild.description: built-in plan agent, then build agent continues the session; both pinned to qwen3-coder-next
